title.en: Ye Tian was cultivating when he suddenly felt a...

content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating when he suddenly felt a special fluctuation.

"Chongbao is born!" Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled towards the source of the fluctuation at the fastest speed, and came to his destination in the blink of an eye.

In a dim void.

Ye Tian arrived, and some of the nearby domain ancestors also came here for the first time.

I saw that there were countless energy surges here, and what was being bringed, and it was difficult for ordinary domain ancestors to get a glimpse of what the energy core was.

But Ye Tian, as the ancestor of the Supreme Domain, naturally penetrated everything and saw what was at the core of the energy.

"A mountain range!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"No, it's not an ordinary mountain range, it's a mineral vein!" Ye Tian said darkly.

If it is an ordinary vein, it will not exude such fluctuations, and it must be very precious.

As for what kind of vein, if it can't really be formed, he can't spy on it.

Over time, the mountain range has gradually emerged as a treasure trove of gems that stand tall in the area.

At the same time, many domain ancestors also knew about the situation of this ore vein.

"It's a saint-grade vein!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor was shocked.

"Saint-grade veins!" Ye Tian was also quite surprised.

The value of a saint-grade vein is much more precious than a holy relic, it is a real treasure mine!

The ore materials born from the saint-level ore vein can be used to refine the holy soldiers, and many supreme domain ancestors want to have a holy weapon that fits their own, and the holy relics that must be suitable for combat are relatively rare, and the use of ordinary holy relics plus saint-level materials to refine the holy soldiers, this is the mainstream.

But saint-grade materials are too scarce, if there are no saint-level materials, only ordinary materials are used, there is no way to transform holy relics into holy soldiers.

One can imagine how valuable a saint-grade vein is.

For example, such a saint-level ore vein in front of him is enough to supply a big force to refine a large number of saint-level soldiers, and there is no need to worry about the situation that there are not enough saint-level materials.

You must know that ordinary sects are not qualified to have a saint-level vein, and only saint-level forces have a saint-level vein.

However, the Saint-grade ore vein is not a continuous ore vein, once it is used up, it will really be used up, so many holy places may not have many Saint-grade ore materials.

Many domain ancestors didn't rob it, because saint-level materials were not easy to mine, and even if they fought, it would be a waste of time.

Moreover, it was impossible for other domain ancestors to sit back and watch them slowly exploit the saint-grade ore veins.

What's more, this saint-level vein appeared in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and it was impossible for the human race to allow the saint-level vein to be snatched and mined by others.

"This saint-level ore vein belongs to our human race, everyone leave!"

Ye Tian appeared on the saint-level ore vein, facing the domain ancestors outside the human race, and spoke.

The domain ancestors outside the human race did not make trouble, although they did not know about Ye Tian's sweep of the four-star kings of the ghost fox organization, but Ye Tian had killed two four-star kings outside the human realm before, and this matter could be spread all over the world.

Therefore, no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength was, they didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian.

Unless it was the strongest domain ancestor who was at the top of the top ten holy gates on the supreme list, he would dare to compete with Ye Tian, otherwise he would not dare to make a mistake.

As a result, these domain ancestors outside the human race retreated one by one without saying a word.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, began to arrange a large array to envelop this saint-level ore vein to prevent other domain ancestors from sneaking in here to mine the vein.

In addition, Ye Tian also sent dozens of domain ancestors to guard here, including several top domain ancestors.

If someone breaks into this place, he will be summoned as soon as possible, and he will rush to him immediately.

......

Dark Sanctuary, Qingyuan Sanctuary.

Qingyuan Holy Land is a declining holy land, ranking last among the seventy-two holy places, and it may even be deprived of the name of the holy place.

Although there have always been seventy-two holy sites, it is not that they cannot be banned, but they are often banned.

For example, some sects are very powerful and have given birth to a topless domain ancestor, and some of the topless domain ancestors of the holy land have fallen, and they will be banned by such a sect.

Once, the Qingyuan Holy Land was only a sect, known as the Qingyuan Sect, and later gave birth to the Superior Domain Ancestor, and snatched a Holy Realm, which was among the Holy Lands.

But now, the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land was seriously injured and had been recuperating in retreat, and the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land did not have an outstanding powerhouse at this level.

Except for that Superior Domain Ancestor, the strength of the Qingyuan Holy Land is not as good as some of the top sects, and the top few sects actually have hidden Peerless Domain Ancestors, but without the Holy Realm as the headquarters, I can't become a Holy Land-level force.

A holy realm, a peerless domain ancestor, these are the two necessary conditions for becoming a holy land.

It is conceivable that once something happens to the Superior Domain Ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land, then the Qingyuan Holy Land will be immediately kicked out of the Holy Land, and thus banned by those top sects.

Therefore, the situation of the Qingyuan Holy Land is very dangerous, and he has always wanted to find an opportunity to strengthen the strength of the Holy Land.

At this time, the fact that a saint-level ore vein was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm was known to the Qingyuan Holy Land, and it immediately attracted the attention of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

The Qingyuan Holy Land is very poor among the Holy Lands, and the Holy Realm it has is also a Sacred Realm with scarce resources, it is considered an incomparably ancient Holy Realm, and the resources have been mined too much, and even the origin has been damaged, so it is difficult to give birth to Saint-level ore veins.

Once they have obtained the saint-level ore veins, they can create a lot of holy soldiers, thus arming the invincible domain ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

In that case, the strength of the Qingyuan Holy Land would directly rise to a notch.

Inside the Qingyuan Holy Land.

An elder of the Qingyuan Holy Land, the Qingxu Domain Ancestor, and the current Holy Lord of the Qingyuan Holy Land, the Qingfeng Holy Lord, were discussing the matter of the saint-level ore vein in the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

"Holy Lord, a saint-level vein was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, once our Qingyuan Holy Land obtains this saint-level vein, our strength will inevitably increase!"

Qingxu Domain Ancestor said excitedly.

"The strength of our Qingyuan Holy Land is too weak, are you qualified to meddle?"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord said worriedly.

"Holy Lord, don't worry, those Holy Gates should not covet a Saint-level mineral vein, and they will definitely not fight for it with all their might, at most, some Domain Ancestors in the Holy Gate are interested. As for the other holy lands, they may be afraid of the strength of the battle gate, and they may not necessarily make immediate moves. Therefore, as long as we act quickly and immediately snatch this saint-level ore vein, as long as we don't kill the domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, we will not offend the War Gate. This is an opportunity, we only need to send a few Invincible Domain Ancestors, and then understand the holy relics of our Holy Land-Qingyuan Realm Bead, then we can directly cut off the void where the saint-level ore vein is located, seal it in the Qingyuan Realm Bead, and then leave the Xuanxu Saint Realm in an instant. The Qingxu Domain Ancestor proposed.

"It's a bit of an adventure!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord hesitated.

"Holy Lord, this is a great opportunity, if the saint-level ore veins appear in the Dark Sacred Realm, where is our chance, not to mention that now the eyes of some of the top holy places of the major holy gates are attracted by the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and they don't have time to pay attention to the situation in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm, this is also our best opportunity. Could it be that the Holy Lord wants our Qingyuan Holy Land to fall into the Holy Land?"

Qingxu Domain Ancestor hurriedly persuaded him.

"Okay, done"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord gritted his teeth and decided.
